auth.loginSubtitle: Choose how you'd like to sign in
auth.whatsappSubtitle: We'll send a 6-digit code to your WhatsApp
auth.phoneVerifySubtitle: Enter your phone number to keep your account secure
auth.phoneSmsNote: We'll send a verification code via SMS
auth.errorInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.headline: From Conversation to Code.
hero.description: Yappaflow listens to your client conversations, generates production-ready code in real-time, and deploys autonomously. The entire web agency pipeline — automated by AI.

features.listenDesc: Connect WhatsApp, Instagram, or join a voice call. Yappaflow's AI listens, transcribes, and extracts project requirements in real-time. No briefs, no back-and-forth.
features.buildDesc: Claude processes your client's vision into production-ready code. Full-stack applications, CMS configurations, or custom builds — generated in minutes, not weeks.
features.shipDesc: Deploy to Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, IKAS, or custom hosting. Yappaflow handles domain purchasing, DNS configuration, and server provisioning automatically.

detail.headline: Connect Once. Deploy Everywhere.
detail.description: Integrate your favorite platforms and let Yappaflow handle the rest. From client intake to live deployment, every step is automated.

showcase.headline: What Effortless Agency Work Looks Like
showcase.card1Desc: Every client message is analyzed for project scope, budget signals, and timeline expectations before your team even reads it.
showcase.card2Desc: Your compliance policies and coding standards are built into every generation. All code follows your agency's standards automatically.
showcase.card3Desc: AI generates and validates. Yappaflow checks every generated component against your standards before it goes out. The AI writes fast; Yappaflow keeps it compliant.

demo.headline: See It Work
demo.description: Watch Yappaflow capture a client call, generate a full e-commerce store, and deploy it to Shopify — all in under 10 minutes.

integrations.headline: Every Platform. Every Channel. Automated.
integrations.description: Your whole agency communicates with confidence. Issues get fixed at the source. Automation focuses on what matters.
integrations.shopifyDesc: Deploy full storefronts with themes and products.
integrations.wordpressDesc: Generate themes, plugins, and complete sites.
integrations.webflowDesc: Create responsive Webflow projects via API.
integrations.hostingerDesc: Provision servers and deploy custom builds.

api.headline: Build on Yappaflow Infrastructure
api.description: Add AI-powered code generation to any agent, copilot, or internal tool with one API. Every piece of content validated against your agency standards before it reaches users.

trust.headline: Enterprise-Grade Security
trust.description: Built for agencies where the stakes are high. Your client data is encrypted, isolated, and never used for model training.

cta.headline: See Yappaflow On Your Projects
cta.description: Run your real client projects through Yappaflow. Watch builds get generated and deployed at the source. See your team finally unblocked.
cta.testimonial: "Our team moves faster because they know exactly what's being built. And our development team finally focuses on real work, not chasing down requirements."
